title: hieracium subramosum subsp. duplicatum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. duplicatum, also known as the hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. duplicatum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its safety and efficacy may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual use.
